ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi Academy in Palermo. For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 293-294 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
